description:
Specification

Product Information

Item Code:W2225P200364

Product Type:General Item

Product Name:PawHut Cat Tree with Litter Box Enclosure, 2 in 1 Floor to Ceiling Cat Tower Litter Box Furniture with Condo, Bed, Hammock, Scratching Posts, and Platforms for Indoor Use, Gray

Place of Origin:China

Main Color:Grey

Main Material:Polyester

Product Dimensions

Assembled Length (in.):31.50

Assembled Width (in.):18.90

Assembled Height (in.):102.40

Weight (lbs.):25.60

Package Size

Length (in.):37.00

Width (in.):23.60

Height (in.):10.00

Weight (lbs.):64.10

Product Features

  • Multifunctional Design: Our unique cat litter furniture combines an adjustable floor-to-ceiling cat tree and a hidden litter box, providing your cat with a relaxation and entertainment space.
  • All-Inclusive Cat Haven: It includes a double-door hidden cat box, a cozy cat condo, a hammock, a bed, platforms, and sisal scratching posts, catering to your cat's every need, from rest to play.
  • Comfort Meets Style: The litter box enclosure is covered with plush and sisal to offer excellent comfort and a stylish design that seamlessly blends with your home decor.
  • Strong Construction: Crafted from tough material and equipped with an anti-tip device, this cat litter house is balanced, stable, and safe for your furry friends. Elevated construction keeps humidity out.
  • Cat Litter Box Info: Overall Dimensions: 31.5" W x 18.9" D x 94.5" - 102.4" H. Weight Capacity: (Litter Box) 22 lbs., (Platforms) 11 lbs., (Hammock) 11 lbs. Suitable for 1-2 cats up to 11 lbs. Assembly required.
